Implement Phase 5 (Auto-Detection) for Layer 2 of 12-layer architecture

## Context
Phase 1 COMPLETE: Conversation DAG with undo/redo/edit/branches working (commit d0c02228). All 222 tests passing.

## Task
Implement Layer 2 auto-detection capabilities:
- LLM off-track detection (groveling/apologizing patterns: 'You're absolutely right', 'I apologize')
- Circular conversation detection (repeated similar responses)
- Suggestion system for compaction triggers
- User prompts for intervention

## Notes
- Use FMPL @ operator for pattern matching (already working)
- Create lib/compaction.fmpl with detection helpers
- TUI integration: Check after each LLM response
- User confirmation before compacting
- Keep context clean. Update specs and docs as needed.
- make sure to test thoroughly after the changes.
